name: hackernews
description: Fetch stories and data from Hacker News using the official API. Can also analyze a user's comment history using an LLM to answer questions about them.

api_key.description: OpenAI API key for LLM-based analysis tools.

model.description: OpenAI model to use for analysis.

cookie.description: Value of the HN 'user' cookie from your browser (DevTools → Application → Cookies → news.ycombinator.com → user). Required only for the submit_story tool.
